questionEN: A developer needs to give instructions to an AI tool. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да даде инструкции на AI tool. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Prompt е входът, който насочва AI системата.
explanationEN: prompt is the best fit here because it directly supports the described AI for Developers workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to describe the AI system being used. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да опише използваната AI система. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Model е обучената система, която прави predictions или генерира output.
explanationEN: model is the best fit here because it directly supports the described AI for Developers workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to split text for model processing. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да раздели текст за model processing. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Tokens са парчета текст, с които language models работят.
explanationEN: token is the best fit here because it directly supports the described AI for Developers workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to limit how much text the model can consider. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да ограничи колко текст model-ът може да разгледа. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Context window е максималният обем input/output context.
explanationEN: context window is the best fit here because it directly supports the described AI for Developers workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to recognize confident but false output. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да разпознае уверен, но грешен output. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Hallucination е output, който звучи убедително, но не е вярен.
explanationEN: hallucination is the best fit here because it directly supports the described AI for Developers workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to check risky AI output before acting. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да провери рисков AI output преди действие. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Human review намалява вредата при high-impact AI decisions.
explanationEN: human review is the best fit here because it directly supports the described AI for Developers workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to avoid sending secrets to a tool. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да избегне изпращане на secrets към tool. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Privacy review уточнява дали данните могат да се използват с даден tool.
explanationEN: privacy review is the best fit here because it directly supports the described AI for Developers workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to protect prompts from malicious user text. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да пази prompts от malicious user text. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Prompt injection се опитва да промени инструкциите чрез входни данни.
explanationEN: prompt injection is the best fit here because it directly supports the described AI for Developers workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to attach source material to improve answers. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да добави source material за по-добри отговори. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Grounding свързва output с надеждни източници.
explanationEN: grounding is the best fit here because it directly supports the described AI for Developers workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to find relevant documents before answering. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да намери relevant documents преди отговор. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Retrieval добавя външен context към AI отговор.
explanationEN: retrieval is the best fit here because it directly supports the described AI for Developers workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to represent meaning as vectors. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да представи meaning като vectors. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Embeddings кодират semantic meaning в numeric vectors.
explanationEN: embedding is the best fit here because it directly supports the described AI for Developers workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to control randomness in generation. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да контролира randomness при generation. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Temperature влияе колко разнообразен е generated output.
explanationEN: temperature is the best fit here because it directly supports the described AI for Developers workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to measure model behavior with tests. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да измери model behavior с тестове. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Evals проверяват quality, safety и regressions.
explanationEN: evals is the best fit here because it directly supports the described AI for Developers workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to label input into categories. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да класифицира input в категории. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Classification избира category label за input.
explanationEN: classification is the best fit here because it directly supports the described AI for Developers workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to predict a numeric value. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да предскаже numeric value. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Regression прогнозира числова стойност.
explanationEN: regression is the best fit here because it directly supports the described AI for Developers workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to run a trained model on new input. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да стартира trained model върху нов input. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Inference използва model-а след training.
explanationEN: inference is the best fit here because it directly supports the described AI for Developers workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to detect unfair patterns in data. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да открие unfair patterns в data. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Bias може да доведе до несправедливи или неточни outputs.
explanationEN: bias is the best fit here because it directly supports the described AI for Developers workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to notice memorizing instead of generalizing. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да забележи memorizing вместо generalizing. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Overfitting означава, че model-ът се справя с training data, но не generalize-ва.
explanationEN: overfitting is the best fit here because it directly supports the described AI for Developers workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to test during model development. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да тества по време на model development. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Validation set помага да се оценява model без training leakage.
explanationEN: validation set is the best fit here because it directly supports the described AI for Developers workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to adapt a model to a narrower task. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да адаптира model към по-тясна задача. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Fine-tuning променя model weights за specific task или style.
explanationEN: fine-tuning is the best fit here because it directly supports the described AI for Developers workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to set high-level assistant behavior. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да зададе high-level assistant behavior. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: System prompt дефинира role, constraints и приоритети за assistant.
explanationEN: system prompt is the best fit here because it directly supports the described AI for Developers workflow.
